category_sources: source_facts.description says dvdrtools is a fork of cdrtools DVD writer support; source_facts.homepage is the GNU Savannah project page.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and Savannah project identity use dvdrtools.

tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies DVD writer support and cdrtools lineage; executable dvdrecord indicates command-line disc writing.
